ogTitle: Avalon Beach vs Avisford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Avalon Beach and Avisford.
heading: Avalon Beach vs Avisford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Avalon Beach, New South Wales and Avisford, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Avalon Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Avisford (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Avalon Beach or Avisford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Avalon Beach has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Avisford scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Avalon Beach scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Avisford scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Avalon Beach or Avisford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Avalon Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
